response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the experience level for an entry/junior role, with 15+ years of fullstack work including TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL-adjacent databases. Technical fit is excellent, but seniority mismatch raises real concerns about salary expectations, role satisfaction, and retention. Berlin location and basic German are positives for the on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience with AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level individual contributor role
Likely salary expectations exceed budget for entry-level position
Only basic German may limit integration in a local construction/consulting domain
